checks.name: default greeting preserved (verbose off)
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from mycli import main; assert main(['World']) == 'Hello, World!'"

checks.name: verbose flag prefixes output
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from mycli import main; assert main(['--verbose', 'World']) == '[VERBOSE] Hello, World!'"

checks.name: --verbose appears in --help text
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from mycli import build_parser; assert '--verbose' in build_parser().format_help()"
